description: Evidence from code-to-code MHD eigenvalue benchmarks and from violating Kumar's H1-H5 constraints to see the framework break in the predicted way.

open_questions.question: The field appears to agree about Numerical eigenvalue benchmarks and constraint-violation tests. What experiment or derivation would actually change this consensus?

suggested_next_steps.description: Identify a measurement that, if it landed at a value contrary to the current consensus, would force a rewrite within the group.
suggested_next_steps.title: Counter-experiment proposal

title: Numerical eigenvalue benchmarks and constraint-violation tests
